raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"The delegation is vague; are you seeking feedback primarily on the technical content and logic (option A) or on the writing style and structure (option B)?","rationale":{"R1.2":"The open-ended query 'What do you think?' about a research draft implies checking logical consistency of the argument chain as a central responsibility.","R1.3":"General feedback on the artifact likely includes verifying if claims align with reported evidence, making this a central expectation.","R1.5":"The draft's structure appears disorganized, so structural reorganization at section or subsection level is centrally expected in response to the query.","R1.6":"The artifact exhibits clear issues with sentence-level grammar and flow, rendering writing polish a load-bearing aspect of any feedback.","RX.1":"As a cross-cutting dimension, disclosing uncertainties in the described framework is centrally relevant to responsible feedback on this research text.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims is a key expectation when opining on a draft that makes technical contribution claims.","RX.3":"Ensuring adherence to the stated scope of the optimization problem is central to evaluating the artifact's content.","RX.4":"Checking for potential downstream harms from the proposed algorithm is important in feedback on AI-related research.","RX.5":"Verifying provenance of claims like prior showings and experiments is expected in a general review of the draft."}}

parsed.clarification_question: The delegation is vague; are you seeking feedback primarily on the technical content and logic (option A) or on the writing style and structure (option B)?

rationale.R1.2: The open-ended query 'What do you think?' about a research draft implies checking logical consistency of the argument chain as a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.3: General feedback on the artifact likely includes verifying if claims align with reported evidence, making this a central expectation.
rationale.R1.5: The draft's structure appears disorganized, so structural reorganization at section or subsection level is centrally expected in response to the query.
rationale.R1.6: The artifact exhibits clear issues with sentence-level grammar and flow, rendering writing polish a load-bearing aspect of any feedback.
rationale.RX.1: As a cross-cutting dimension, disclosing uncertainties in the described framework is centrally relevant to responsible feedback on this research text.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is a key expectation when opining on a draft that makes technical contribution claims.
rationale.RX.3: Ensuring adherence to the stated scope of the optimization problem is central to evaluating the artifact's content.
rationale.RX.4: Checking for potential downstream harms from the proposed algorithm is important in feedback on AI-related research.
rationale.RX.5: Verifying provenance of claims like prior showings and experiments is expected in a general review of the draft.
